name: New API endpoint
description: Add one HTTP endpoint to the operator API or another existing surface. Includes route handler, request validation, response shape, and tests.
architectHints: Mirror the shape of an existing nearby endpoint in operator-api.ts; do not invent a new framework.
Define request/response schemas in @reddwarf/contracts so the dashboard can share them.
Authentication: every endpoint that mutates state must require the operator bearer token.
If the new endpoint surfaces or filters by repo, include the same operator-config / repo-allowlist guards used by neighbouring routes.
validatorRules: Add at least one happy-path integration test that hits the endpoint via http through createOperatorApiServer.
Add at least one auth-gate test confirming an unauthenticated request returns 401.
Document the new path in docs/reference/OPERATOR_API.md.
reviewerRubric: Is the URL shape consistent with the rest of the API (plural collections, :id parameter style, verb naming)?
Does the response carry enough info that the dashboard does not need a follow-up request?
Are errors returned as structured `{error, message}` JSON, never raw stack traces?
